description: Small fragment of a legal document, probably, in Arabic script. Involving Abū l-Maʿālī b. Abū Yaʿqūb Ibn Kūshak. Mentions the year 515 AH and regular payments of 1/2 dinar. In the upper margin there is a name in Hebrew, [Yehu]da b. Natan.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
